notes: Wrapped handleAddTouchpoint (dep array: [workspaceId, tabId, touchpoints]) and handleAddStage (dep array: [workspaceId, tabId, stages]) in React.useCallback. Both were already listed in handleKeyDown's dependency array — no change needed there. The touchpoints dep is needed because offset=touchpoints.length reads the array directly (not via functional updater). Similarly stages.length is read directly in handleAddStage. Pattern matches IMP-008 fix in flow-canvas.tsx exactly.
